analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will host COP15 in Kunming and is ready to work with all parties to ensure positive outcomes. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; the tweet stresses China’s cooperative, multilateral role as host, willing to work with all parties for positive outcomes, aligning with benevolence and support for international cooperation. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not about domestic achievements or leadership success claims. CH6 (interesting culture/nature): While Kunming/Yunnan are mentioned, the focus is on the conference, not promoting culture or nature. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
